title: The Rage
director: Myron J. Gold, Raphael J. Sevilla
writer: Myron J. Gold, Raphael J. Sevilla
actors: June Wilkinson, Armando Silvestre, Xavier Loyá
plot: Tito is a swindler who plans to appropriate a large sum of money supposedly sent abroad by airplane, with the complicity of Carlos, the cashier of a big company. Waiting for the plan to develop, Tito's relationship with an America...
